---
title: "Atlantis Documentation Portal"
---

## User Guides

- **[Part I - Setup, Physics, and Biology](user_guides/quarto_site/part1/index.qmd)** - User guide covering model setup, configuration, input and output files, physical, biogeochemical, and biological processes.
- **[Part II - Fisheries, Management, and Economics](user_guides/quarto_site/part2/index.qmd)** - User guide covering the human components of the Atlantis model: fishing, management, and economics.

## Additional Resources

- **[Confluence Wiki](confluence/index.qmd)** - *Coming soon*
- **[Resources](resources/index.qmd)** - *Coming soon*
